message:
feat: capture replay infrastructure, retro visual effects, textarea overhaul, WASM showcase expansion

Wide-reaching enhancement across the FrankenTUI framework (34 files,
+1918/-556 lines) spanning diagnostics, visual effects, text editing,
and web integration:

Capture replay system (doctor_frankentui):
- capture.rs: +655 lines implementing CaptureReplay and FrameDeserializer
  for recording and playing back terminal sessions with full terminal
  emulation, enabling reproducible bug reports and visual regression testing
- cli.rs: new CLI flags for capture replay control
- doctor.rs: +196 lines of expanded diagnostic checks
- runmeta.rs: new run metadata fields for session attribution

Retro visual effects (ftui-extras):
- New doom_melt/ effect: classic Doom screen-melt transition with
  configurable column delays and palette interpolation
- New quake_console/ effect: Quake-style drop-down console animation
  with smooth easing and transparency
- metaballs.rs: fix metaballs rendering for edge-case viewport sizes
- visual_fx.rs and effects/mod.rs: integrate new effects into the
  effect registry

Textarea overhaul (ftui-widgets):
- textarea.rs: +492 line major rework implementing proper soft-wrap with
  Unicode grapheme cluster awareness, cursor movement respecting wrap
  boundaries, and scroll-into-view with wrap-aware line calculations
- New textarea_soft_wrap.rs test suite for wrap behavior verification
- input.rs, list.rs, scrollbar.rs, table.rs, tabs.rs, tree.rs,
  virtualized.rs: widget-wide improvements to layout negotiation,
  focus handling, and accessibility attributes

Core infrastructure:
- ftui-core: input parser refinements, new terminal capability flags
- ftui-layout: layout engine and pane management updates
- ftui-render/buffer.rs: render buffer adjustments for new effects
- ftui-runtime: conformal alert, program loop, terminal writer changes
- ftui-style/theme.rs: +64 lines expanding the token-based theme system
- ftui-text: rope, text, and wrap module improvements for soft-wrap

Web and WASM:
- ftui-showcase-wasm: +144 lines expanding the WASM showcase module
  with new demo scenarios
- ftui-web/pane_pointer_capture.rs: expanded pointer capture for web target
- frankentui_showcase_demo.html: demo page updates
- Cargo.toml: add wasm-bindgen, js-sys, web-sys feature dependencies

Testing and scripts:
- scripts/pane_e2e.sh: end-to-end pane interaction test script
- Update beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,27 +1,34 @@
 [workspace]
 resolver = "2"
-exclude = ["fuzz"]
 members = [
-  "crates/ftui",
-  "crates/ftui-core",
-  "crates/ftui-render",
-  "crates/ftui-style",
-  "crates/ftui-text",
-  "crates/ftui-layout",
-  "crates/ftui-runtime",
-  "crates/ftui-widgets",
-  "crates/ftui-extras",
-  "crates/ftui-harness",
-  "crates/ftui-i18n",
-  "crates/ftui-pty",
-  "crates/ftui-simd",
-  "crates/ftui-demo-showcase",
-  "crates/ftui-backend",
-  "crates/ftui-tty",
-  "crates/ftui-web",
-  "crates/ftui-showcase-wasm",
-  "crates/doctor_frankentui",
+    "crates/doctor_frankentui",
+    "crates/frankenterm-web",
+    "crates/ftui",
+    "crates/ftui-backend",
+    "crates/ftui-core",
+    "crates/ftui-demo-showcase",
+    "crates/ftui-extras",
+    "crates/ftui-harness",
+    "crates/ftui-i18n",
+    "crates/ftui-layout",
+    "crates/ftui-pty",
+    "crates/ftui-render",
+    "crates/ftui-runtime",
+    "crates/ftui-showcase-wasm",
+    "crates/ftui-simd",
+    "crates/ftui-style",
+    "crates/ftui-text",
+    "crates/ftui-tty",
+    "crates/ftui-web",
+    "crates/ftui-widgets",
 ]
+exclude = ["fuzz"]
+
+[workspace.package]
+version = "0.2.1"
+edition = "2024"
+license = "MIT"
+repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui"
 
 [profile.release]
 opt-level = "z"
@@ -30,7 +37,5 @@ codegen-units = 1
 panic = "abort"
 strip = true
 
-# VFX-heavy crate: prefer speed over binary size so the rasterizer
-# inner loops benefit from SIMD, loop unrolling, and aggressive inlining.
 [profile.release.package.ftui-extras]
 opt-level = 3

@@ -27,6 +27,9 @@ pub struct RunMeta {
     pub snapshot_status: Option<String>,
     pub snapshot_exit_code: Option<i32>,
     pub vhs_exit_code: Option<i32>,
+    pub host_vhs_exit_code: Option<i32>,
+    pub vhs_driver_used: Option<String>,
+    pub vhs_docker_log: Option<String>,
     pub video_exists: Option<bool>,
     pub snapshot_exists: Option<bool>,
     pub video_duration_seconds: Option<f64>,
@@ -36,6 +39,10 @@ pub struct RunMeta {
     pub trace_id: Option<String>,
     pub fallback_active: Option<bool>,
     pub fallback_reason: Option<String>,
+    pub capture_error_reason: Option<String>,
+    pub ttyd_shim_log: Option<String>,
+    pub ttyd_runtime_log: Option<String>,
+    pub vhs_no_sandbox_forced: Option<bool>,
     pub policy_id: Option<String>,
     pub evidence_ledger: Option<String>,
     pub fastapi_output_mode: Option<String>,

@@ -21,6 +21,7 @@ serde_json = "1.0.145"
 [target.'cfg(target_arch = "wasm32")'.dependencies]
 js-sys = "0.3.85"
 wasm-bindgen = "0.2.108"
+getrandom = { version = "0.3.4", features = ["wasm_js"] }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 pretty_assertions = "1.4.1"

@@ -640,6 +640,70 @@ pub mod themes {
             scrollbar_thumb: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(60, 61, 54)),
         }
     }
+
+    /// Doom color scheme (High contrast, Industrial).
+    #[must_use]
+    pub fn doom() -> Theme {
+        Theme {
+            primary: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(178, 34, 34)), // Firebrick
+            secondary: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(50, 205, 50)), // LimeGreen
+            accent: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(255, 255, 0)), // Yellow (Ammo)
+
+            background: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(26, 26, 26)), // Dark Grey
+            surface: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(47, 47, 47)),    // Gunmetal
+            overlay: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(64, 64, 64)),    // Dim Grey
+
+            text: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(211, 211, 211)), // Light Grey
+            text_muted: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(128, 128, 128)), // Grey
+            text_subtle: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(105, 105, 105)), // Dim Grey
+
+            success: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(50, 205, 50)), // Green
+            warning: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(255, 215, 0)), // Gold
+            error: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(139, 0, 0)),     // Dark Red
+            info: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(65, 105, 225)),   // Royal Blue
+
+            border: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(105, 105, 105)), // Dim Grey
+            border_focused: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(178, 34, 34)), // Firebrick
+
+            selection_bg: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(139, 0, 0)), // Dark Red
+            selection_fg: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(255, 255, 255)), // White
+
+            scrollbar_track: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(26, 26, 26)),
+            scrollbar_thumb: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(178, 34, 34)),
+        }
+    }
+
+    /// Quake color scheme (Earth tones, Medieval).
+    #[must_use]
+    pub fn quake() -> Theme {
+        Theme {
+            primary: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(139, 69, 19)), // SaddleBrown
+            secondary: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(85, 107, 47)), // DarkOliveGreen
+            accent: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(205, 133, 63)),   // Peru
+
+            background: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(28, 28, 28)), // Very Dark Grey
+            surface: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(46, 39, 34)),    // Deep Brown/Grey
+            overlay: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(62, 54, 48)),    // Lighter Brown/Grey
+
+            text: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(210, 180, 140)), // Tan
+            text_muted: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(139, 115, 85)), // Dark Tan
+            text_subtle: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(101, 84, 61)), // Deep Tan
+
+            success: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(85, 107, 47)), // Olive
+            warning: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(210, 105, 30)), // Chocolate
+            error: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(128, 0, 0)),     // Maroon
+            info: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(70, 130, 180)),   // SteelBlue
+
+            border: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(93, 64, 55)), // Rusty Brown
+            border_focused: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(205, 133, 63)), // Peru
+
+            selection_bg: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(139, 69, 19)), // SaddleBrown
+            selection_fg: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(255, 222, 173)), // NavajoWhite
+
+            scrollbar_track: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(28, 28, 28)),
+            scrollbar_thumb: AdaptiveColor::fixed(Color::rgb(139, 69, 19)),
+        }
+    }
 }
 
 // ============================================================================

@@ -357,6 +357,7 @@ fi
 if $RUN_WEB; then
     run_cargo_test_step "pane_web_pointer_smoke" -p ftui-web pointer_move_axis_lock_ignores_orthogonal_jitter -- --nocapture || true
     run_cargo_test_step "pane_web_runner_core_smoke" -p ftui-showcase-wasm runner_core_pane_pointer_lifecycle_emits_capture_commands -- --nocapture || true
+    run_cargo_test_step "pane_web_runner_core_interruptions_smoke" -p ftui-showcase-wasm runner_core_pane_blur_releases_active_capture -- --nocapture || true
 
     if [[ "$MODE" != "smoke" ]]; then
         run_cargo_test_step "pane_web_pointer_full" -p ftui-web pointer_ -- --nocapture || true
